assertions.expectation: Recommends GKE's autoscaled blue-green node pool upgrade strategy as the primary approach for batch workloads — configured with --enable-autoscaling and --autoscaled-rollout-policy flags (NOT surge parameters). Supports wait-for-drain time, longer graceful termination, and PDB upgrade timeout to let jobs complete
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends autoscaled blue-green as the optimal strategy and provides specific commands with --enable-autoscaling and --autoscaled-rollout-policy=blue-green-initial-node-percentage flags

assertions.expectation: Explains that GKE respects terminationGracePeriodSeconds during pod eviction, but surge upgrades have a max eviction timeout
assertions.reason: Response states 'GKE's standard surge upgrade will force-evict your jobs after 1 hour' and shows configuration for terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 57600 (16 hours)

assertions.expectation: Notes that GKE's default pod eviction timeout during surge upgrade is 1 hour — far less than 8-16 hour jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'GKE's standard surge upgrade will force-evict your jobs after 1 hour' which directly addresses this expectation

assertions.expectation: Recommends pausing new batch job submissions before starting the upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Pause new job submissions 30 minutes before upgrade window' in Phase 2 of the upgrade execution plan

assertions.expectation: Advises waiting for in-flight jobs to complete naturally before upgrading their node pool
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Wait for current jobs to complete naturally' in Phase 2 and emphasizes letting jobs complete before node termination

assertions.expectation: Suggests using node affinity or taints to isolate batch workloads on a dedicated node pool
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed configuration for node taints (workload-type=batch:NoSchedule) and corresponding tolerations in job specs, plus nodeSelector configuration

assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading non-batch node pools first while batch jobs complete on the old pool
assertions.reason: While the response mentions upgrading the control plane first, it doesn't specifically recommend upgrading non-batch node pools first - the strategy focuses on autoscaled blue-green for the batch pool itself

assertions.expectation: Does NOT recommend 'No channel' or '--enable-autoupgrade=false' (deprecated) — uses release channels with maintenance exclusions instead
assertions.reason: Response uses maintenance exclusions with --add-maintenance-exclusion commands and doesn't mention disabling auto-upgrades or switching to no channel
